vehicle.label: 6-DOF Industrial Arm
vehicle.desc: 6-DOF serial industrial robot arm, 5kg payload, 600mm reach

parts.label: Base Joint (J1)
parts.spec: Base rotary joint J1, +-180deg, harmonic drive, 100Nm peak torque, mounting flange ISO 9409

parts.label: Shoulder Joint (J2)
parts.spec: Shoulder pitch joint J2, +-120deg, harmonic drive, 80Nm, cable routing through center bore

parts.label: Upper Arm (Link 2-3)
parts.spec: Upper arm link, 300mm length, hollow tube with cable conduit, lightweight Al 7075

parts.label: Elbow Joint (J3)
parts.spec: Elbow pitch joint J3, +-150deg, cycloidal reducer, 50Nm, encoder dual-stack

parts.label: Forearm + Wrist (J4)
parts.spec: Forearm with wrist roll J4, 250mm length, +-360deg continuous, slip ring for power/signal

parts.label: Wrist Pitch (J5)
parts.spec: Wrist pitch joint J5, +-120deg, harmonic drive, 20Nm, compact form factor

parts.label: Wrist Roll (J6)
parts.spec: Wrist final roll joint J6, +-360deg, harmonic drive, 10Nm, ISO 9409-1 50mm tool flange

parts.label: Tool Flange + Changer
parts.spec: Tool changer master plate at J6 end, pneumatic locking, 4 utility ports

parts.label: Cable Management Spine
parts.spec: External cable carrier from base to wrist, drag chain or spiral, signal + power + pneumatic

parts.label: Replaceable Motor Module Set
parts.spec: Actuation_motors closure module: replaceable motor_module cartridges for J1-J6, fastener_access, coupling_dummy, insert/washer preload pads, torque_Nm intent labels

parts.label: Encoder Cover + Sensing Set
parts.spec: Sensing_encoders closure module: encoder_pocket and encoder_cover at each joint, index marks, cable exit strain relief, inspection labels

parts.label: Drive Electronics Bay
parts.spec: Drive_electronics bay with driver_bay, power_channel, signal_channel, ground_point, service cover, connector keying, thermal inspection window

risk.desc: Potential thermal stress due to high heat generation from harmonic drive.
risk.mit: Implement thermal management features such as heat sinks or cooling channels.

risk.desc: Risk of cable damage due to insufficient strain relief.
risk.mit: Ensure all cable exits have strain relief geometry and follow minimum bend radius.

risk.desc: Risk of misalignment during assembly due to unclear assembly sequence.
risk.mit: Provide clear assembly sequence with tool, torque, and datum information.

risk.desc: Risk of structural failure due to inadequate wall thickness in printed sections.
risk.mit: Ensure wall thicknesses are physically plausible and meet material process requirements.

risk.desc: Risk of improper fit due to lack of tolerance stack-up information.
risk.mit: Include stack_up_mm and fit_class for all adjacent interfaces.

physics_paths.path_description: Torque and payload from wrist link transferred through shoulder joint.
Heat from motor housing dissipates through shoulder joint to ambient.
Rotational motion from actuator drives shoulder joint pitch.
Cables from wrist link pass through center bore of shoulder joint.

integration_opportunities.description: Integrate harmonic drive with shoulder joint for smooth motion.
Implement cable management system through center bore.
Mount encoder cover for precise motion tracking.

verification_focus.description: Test joint under maximum torque and payload conditions.
Expose joint to thermal cycling to verify thermal management.
Verify cable routing through center bore is free from interference.

manufacturing_strategy.datum: Primary locating faces and axis rings

Verify electrical connections and signal integrity

generated_parts.label: Drive Electronics Bay
generated_parts.spec: Drive_electronics bay with driver_bay, power_channel, signal_channel, ground_point, service cover, connector keying, thermal inspection window

requirements: Drive electronics bay with driver_bay, power_channel, signal_channel, ground_point, service cover, connector keying, thermal inspection window
Motor power lines and sensor/encoder signal lines run in separate channels or are spaced/crossed at right angles
Each electronics module states its grounding scheme (star point, chassis bond, isolated)
PCBs mount on standoffs with keep-out clearance to walls and moving parts
P0 internal_feature_targets appear as part_tree children and geometry_ops ids or targets
Most geometry_ops include args.at coordinates distributed across the local subsystem volume
Uses seed-characteristic ops: chamfer, drill, subtract, pocket
Dimensions match robot_arm scale: 80-400mm per link, 600-1200mm reach
Includes at least three adjacent-module interfaces or mounting datums
Critical joints need visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence and torque_Nm or preload intent
Assembly sequence and disassembly sequence for field-serviceable parts

risk.desc: Potential thermal hotspots in the power_channel may require additional cooling measures.
risk.mit: Integrate cooling fins with the driver_bay_shell.

risk.desc: Signal_channel may be susceptible to electromagnetic interference without proper shielding.
risk.mit: Add shielding around the signal_channel to mitigate interference.

risk.desc: Harmonic_drive_enclosure may need additional vibration dampening material for improved durability.
risk.mit: Integrate additional vibration dampening material with the harmonic_drive_enclosure.

risk.desc: Service_cover may not provide sufficient access for maintenance tasks.
risk.mit: Ensure the service_cover design allows for easy access to internal components.

risk.desc: Connector_keying may be prone to misalignment during assembly.
risk.mit: Implement clear keying and alignment features on connectors.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Drive electronics bay with driver_bay, power_channel, signal_channel, ground_point, service cover, connector keying, thermal inspection window
physics_paths: power_channel: motor power lines run from motor driver to motor terminals
signal_channel: sensor/encoder signal lines run from motor driver to control board
thermal_inspection_window: allows thermal imaging of internal components for maintenance
ground_point: provides a ground point for all electronics modules
service_cover: provides access for maintenance and service
connector_keying: ensures correct orientation of connectors
integration_opportunities: driver_bay_shell: can be integrated with additional cooling fins for improved thermal management
harmonic_drive_enclosure: can be integrated with additional vibration dampening material for improved durability

manufacturing_strategy.support: orientation: vertical, inspection: visual and CMM check
